CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: Tomahawk Missile
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Long-range, all-weather, jet-powered, surface-launched subsonic cruise missile designed to attack land targets.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: 152mm anti-tank guided missile
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: A wire-guided anti-tank missile launched from a stationary platform, capable of accurately striking ground targets at long range.
